title: Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Assam

overview.short: Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary is a 6.05-square-kilometre (2.34 sq mi) wildlife sanctuary located in Karbi Anglong district, Assam, India.
overview.description: Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary is a 6.05-square-kilometre (2.34 sq mi) wildlife sanctuary located in Karbi Anglong district, Assam, India. It was notified as a Wildlife Sanctuary in 1952 vide notification No, FR.199/52 dated 10/07/52. It is 25 km (16 mi) from Golaghat. The nearest Airport is Dimapur which is 55 km away, and Jorhat Airport is 85 km away.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jorhat Airport (48 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Garampani Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Garampani, Barpathar.
